popularStory.headline: Biography of Sir Richard FitzRobert Lathom 1145 - 1220.
popularStory.description:
Disputed Mother
While his father's identity is secure, his mother is "said to be" a daughter of one "Orm Magnus" and if this is so, she likely, but not absolutely certainly, was the person listed here …

zh.Lathom House, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾拉堂姆 豪斯
zh.Kendal, Westmorland, England: 英國維斯特莫藍德肯達爾
zh.Ormskirk, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾奧姆斯吉可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard FitzRobert de Lathom於1154年5月22日出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親Sir Robert FitzHenry-Lord de Lathom30歲，母親Emma FitzReinfrid29歲。他於1187年之前與Alice Nelson在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1220年4月23日在英國藍卡爾道爾頓享年65歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard FitzRobert de Lathom于1154年5月22日出生在英国越可爾时，他的父亲Sir Robert FitzHenry-Lord de Lathom30岁，母亲Emma FitzReinfrid29岁。他于1187年之前与Alice Nelson在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1220年4月23日在英国藍卡爾道爾頓享年65岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lathom
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Latham
meanings: English: habitational name from Lathom in Lancashire, or occasionally perhaps from Laytham in Yorkshire. The placenames mean ‘at the barns’, from hlǫthum, the dative plural form of Old Norse hlatha ‘barn, store house’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard FitzRobert de Lathom was born on 22 May 1154, in Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Robert FitzHenry-Lord de Lathom, was 30 and his mother, Emma FitzReinfrid, was 29. He married Alice Nelson before 1187, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 23 April 1220, in Dalton, Lancashire, England, at the age of 65, and was buried in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard FitzRobert de Lathom est né le 22 mai 1154, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert FitzHenry-Lord de Lathom, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Emma FitzReinfrid, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Alice Nelson avant 1187, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 23 avril 1220, à Dalton, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard FitzRobert de Lathom am 22. Mai 1154 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert FitzHenry-Lord de Lathom 30 und seine Mutter Emma FitzReinfrid 29. Er hat vor 1187 in England Alice Nelson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 23. April 1220 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Dalton, Lancashire, England und wurde in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard FitzRobert de Lathom è nato il il 22 maggio 1154 nel Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert FitzHenry-Lord de Lathom, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Emma FitzReinfrid, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Alice Nelson prima del 1187, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 23 aprile 1220, nel Dalton, Lancashire, England, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard FitzRobert de Lathomが1154年5月22日にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Robert FitzHenry-Lord de Lathomは30歳，母Emma FitzReinfridは29歳であった。1187年以前にイギリスでAlice Nelsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1220年4月23日にイギリスランカシュアイアダルトンで65歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard FitzRobert de Lathom(이)가 1154년 5월 22일 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert FitzHenry-Lord de Lathom(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma FitzReinfrid(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1187년 이전 영국에서 Alice Nelson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1220년 4월 23일 영국 랭카실르 돌턴에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에 묻혔다.

mn.22 May 1154–23 April 1220: 1154 оны Тавдугаар сарын 22–1220 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 23

pt.22 May 1154–23 April 1220: 22 de maio de 1154–23 de abril de 1220
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard FitzRobert de Lathom nasceu em 22 de maio de 1154, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert FitzHenry-Lord de Lathom, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Emma FitzReinfrid, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Nelson antes 1187, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 23 de abril de 1220, em Dalton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard FitzRobert de Lathom родился 22 мая 1154 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert FitzHenry-Lord de Lathom было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma FitzReinfrid, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Nelson перед 1187 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 23 апреля 1220 г. в местности далтон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.22 May 1154–23 April 1220: 22 de mayo de 1154–23 de abril de 1220
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard FitzRobert de Lathom nació el 22 de mayo de 1154, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert FitzHenry-Lord de Lathom, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Emma FitzReinfrid, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Alice Nelson antes de 1187, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 23 de abril de 1220, en Dalton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
